primary_text:
One monthly fee. Everything routine at the vet is covered.

Unlimited consults. All vaccinations and boosters. $250 off dental. Annual blood and urine tests. 24/7 virtual vet access.

$50/month per pet. That is it.

No claims to file. No excess to pay. No pre-existing condition traps. Not insurance.

Just a wellness plan that covers what your pet needs, every year, at your local vet.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: One fee. Every routine vet cost covered.
description: $50/month. Unlimited consults, vaccinations, $250 off dental. Your local vet.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
creative_brief: Clean, minimal design. Single checkmark graphic next to each inclusion. White space, readable.
